MASTER AIR EXPRESS CO. LTD -  Agent Tariff - 1st July 2025
*  Above 50 Kg shipment please call to our Sales or Customer Support team for special rate.
( 1 ) All values are in U.S Dollars and Exchange Rate will be determind as per monthly fixation by IAEAB.
( 2 ) Previous quoted all rates are invalid after 30 June 2025 and above rate will be effective from 1st July 2025 until further information.
( 3 ) (a) FSc -15% will be charge for every shipment which courier has Advance Deposit. (b) FSc - 20% will be charge for every shipment if don't have Advance Deposit to Master Air.

( 4 ) DHL / FedEx / UPS Remote area, Restricted Destination , Elevated Risk Fee, Oversize & Overweight Fee will be charge to the sender so prior handover shipments to Master air please check DHL , FedEx, UPS extra surcharges, it's Agent resonsibility.

( 5 ) (a) FedEx / UPS Residential DlvryFee $5.0+ FSC (b) DHL, FedEx, UPS Address correction Fee $18.00 + Fsc (c) DHL, FedEx, UPS Remote area fee U$40+Fsc (d) DHL / FedEx Risk fee $50 & Elevated Risk fee $45/-
( 6 ) (a) DHL, FedEx,UPS 24 Kg above over weight charge apply per pcs / box USD30 and 70 Kg above USD150  (b) DHL / FedEx / UPS Oversize charge apply USD50 if any pcs or box exceeding 100CM
( 7 ) For avoid delay delivery Non-dox shipment must be declare in the Invoice exact item name, quantity, unit price( original value) for avoid customs low value and delay in customs clearance.
( 8 ) Volume weight will be calculate when it will be higher than Gross weight.( Length x Width x Height _CM) / 5000 = Volumetric ( Kg ) & .( Length x Width x Height _IN) / 305 = Volumetric ( Kg ),

( 9 ) Destination Country customs Duty / Taxes, VAT, Handling charges are not included in this quotation. Destination country customs Duty / tax must be payable by consignee.In case the shipper agreed to pay then admin fee will be add with duty and delive
( 10 ) In case of any service failure partial or full missing any shipment, we will give compensation base on the terms, condition and amount mentioned in the reverse page of the Master Air waybill.
( 11 ) If any package refuse to send at destination any service provider from gateway,  we will try to use alternate service and you have to pay service charge accordingly.
( 12 ) If any package increase weight will notify with the proof of service provider email and have to pay charge accordingly.
(13)  For enjoy DHL, FedEx and UPS Rest of the world rates you have to check with Master air first about DHL, FedEx & UPS  service available or not desired country.

(14) FedEx no service to Central African, Canary Island, Comoros, Cuba,Ecotorial Guinea,Guernsey,Falkisland, Bissau, Iran, Johnston IslandKribati,Korea North, Myanmar, Nauru, Niue Saint Pierre Et Miquelon, Sao Tome, Principe, Sierra Leone,
Solomon Islands,Somalia,St.Helena,Sudan,South Sudan,Syria, Tajikistan, Tokelau Islands,Turkmenistan, Tuvalu, Vatican City, Wake Islands, Yemen, Zaire.

( 16 ) Rate quoted does not included Local VAT, TAX, AIT any of the countries of Origin.
( 17 ) Required standard business days for delivery of your shipment from Bangladesh to anywhere in the world, if no delay occurs in customs or any others reason beyond Master air control.

( 18 ) FedEx have own policy that if any shipment undelivered for any reason, have to provide required information within FedEx given deadline, otherwise FedEx will return the shipment to Dubai and bill to sender return charges no way to avoid return char
( 19 ) FedEx Dubai would't accept value exceed USD 269, Face Mask, Surgical items not allowed by FedEx. Don't send Medicine & counterfeit items.
( 20 ) Counterfeit / copy brand / fake item don't send please, if you send Master air isn't liable in case held any business hub / point.

( 21 ) For Europe country shipments EORI ( Economic Operator Registration and Identification ) number is required to mention in the AWB and Invoice otherwise impossible to arrange transhipment from Dubai through DHL service, By FedEx or UPS will move.
( 22 ) CC (COD) shipment applicable for Korea, Hong Kong, China, Indonesia, Vietnam, Taiwan, New York, New Jersey, Los Angels Only.
(a) Billing : Monthly ( Condition Apply ). Master Air will submit Bill / Invoice within 5th of the following month.

(b) Payment : Monthly Invoice should be settle within 7 days from the date of submission of Bill / Invoice. Please complete the transaction within the specified period to avoid penalties ( interest ) due to late payments.
